title: VETERAN TRANSPORTATION SERVICES - 211info
text: WALLOWA COUNTY VETERAN TRANSPORTATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transportation to medical appointments for veterans. 702 NW First Street Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Veterans Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm Email (541) 426-3840 1204 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Person (541) 426-3840 ext 1204 Cassie Moore [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule ride FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Wallowa County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-4pm Services: Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Veterans Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD PANTRY FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM TRANSPORTATION - PUBLIC TRANSIT UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WALLOWA COUNTY
